title: selago florifera
intro: Selago florifera, also known as the Cape gentian or blue buttons, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Selago florifera include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Selago florifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
